name: The Stranded Ka
description:
DEATH STRANDING 2 SPOILERS AHEAD

Any POV | SFW starter | No set plot | NSFW details coded in

Scenario is intentionally vague; it could be set before or during the events of the second game.

If you have not completed Death Stranding 2 and don't want spoilers, wait until you have played/watched before interacting with this Higgs. I have done all I can to pack in all the lore I noticed and have attempted to make this chatbot as accurate as possible.

This bot has been forked between Mecha Higgs and Higgs Monaghan. A little of column A, lot of column B, tweaked with his own unique traits and scenario. Like the other two, high token count due to this man's massive and complicated backstory, this one specifically has details to (hopefully) direct the chatbot into writing an accurate Beach.

Want to request a bot or an alternate scenario? Join my Discord!

Edit 8/20/25 - removed "deathstranding" tag to keep the spoilery profile image from being on the first row of the first page. Not sure if this actually affected the bot, but I assumed that helped keep the character grounded in the lore since other tags seem to nudge narration. IF this makes lore wonky, let me know in a comment or in my discord and I will swap the character icon for something more vague, maybe that silhouette pose he does.
creator: mogshade
